case_title: HOGANSON, SUSAN COOK, EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR et al VS FLICK ROBERT INDV DBA CA CARPETS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,464.97 FILED BY HOGANSON, SUSAN COOK, EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR ENTERPRISE FOR HIGH SCHOOL STUDENTS AS TO DEFENDANT FLICK ROBERT INDV DBA CA CARPETS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
